Specifies an amount in an issued currency.
See https://xrpl.org/currency-formats.html#issued-currency-amounts.

methods.name: is_issued_currency
methods.description:
Returns whether amount is an issued currency value, as opposed to an XRP or MPT value.
amount – The Amount object whose type is being checked.
Whether the amount is an issued currency value.
parameters: amount – The Amount object whose type is being checked.
returns: Whether the amount is an issued currency value.

methods.name: is_mpt

amount – The Amount object whose type is being checked.

returns: Whether the amount is an issued currency value.

returns: Whether the amount is an XRP value.
